MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Loren Perelman'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; Defendant Loren Perelman'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions IS GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge: Peter j. Van Zandt; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (hk/302/jpt).

Defendant Loren Perelman'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-06-2017 Continued To Oct-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT LOREN PERELMAN'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions, as follows:

The parties failed to provide courtesy copies to the court per SF Local Rule 2.7B, and were previously ordered on 9/20 to do so in advance of the new Oct. 6 hearing date. The parties have not done so and the hearing is therefore continued once again, to Oct. 27, 2017. All parties shall immediately provide courtesy copiesof their filings with a cover letter indicating the new hearing date of Oct. 27, 2017.

Judge Pro Tem: David M. Helbraun; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Defendant Loren Perelman'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Continued To Oct-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Loren Perelman's Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions is Continued to October 6, 2017 to give the moving party a chance to comply with SF Local Rule 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of its filings. Please attach a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrrogatories And Request For Prodiction Of Documents; Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Ad Declaration Of Louis R. Barella In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

DEFENDANT LOREN PERELMAN'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production of Documents and Request for Sanctions is continued to September 20, 2017 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. in the discovery department (room 301). All parties shall immediately provide courtesy copies of their filings with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date per SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge Pro Tem:Peter J. Catalanotti; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
